texto: Sailing is the closest I can get to nature - it's adrenaline, fear, a constant challenge and learning experience, an adventure into the unknown. And of course there is nothing better than wearing the same T-shirt for days and not brushing my hair for weeks.
explicacao: Citação de Daria Werbowy sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Sailing is the closest I can get to nature - it's adrenaline, fear, a constant challenge and lear…” articula sabedoria, learning, fear em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como fear e adventure.
